creator: david.pilcher@gmail.com
text:
With an clean install of RC1, with developer package installation, fail to do a buildworld.

--------------------------------------------------------------

How-To-Repeat: Have working 6.2 nanobsd build. I copied the working files from my /usr/src/tools/tools/nanobsd to the new 7.0 RC1 install, start the nanobsd build, and the buildworld fails.  It works fine on 6.2.

Looks like something is wrong in libgcc library compilation to me, although several compiles appear to work before compilation fails.  It always fails at the same place.
